E-Commerce
Marketing
HeroSection.description: We design e-commerce and corporate websites built to reflect your brand, streamline navigation, and maximise conversions. Demanding design, solid development, business vision, and long-term support.

BrandsSection.subtitle: Stories that connect us
BrandsSection.heading: We support hundreds of brands, across all industries.
BrandsSection.description: For 25 years, Tapilla has merged technical expertise and Retail culture (40 years of group experience) to propel ambitious brands. We offer comprehensive support: upstream consulting, elite production, and post-launch performance monitoring.

FaqSection.subtitle: We clarify it all, no jargon
FaqSection.heading:
WE ANSWER YOUR
QUESTIONS, SIMPLY
FaqSection.description: Before working together, it's normal to have questions. Here are the answers to the most common ones — and if you have more, get in touch :)

faq1.q: Why choose an e-commerce agency like Tapilla?
faq1.a: We combine 25 years of tech expertise with deep retail culture. From strategy to post-launch optimisation, our full-stack team delivers measurable growth — not just pretty pages.

faq2.q: What is your technical expertise on Shopify and Shopify Plus?
faq2.a: We're certified Shopify Plus Partners. Our developers build custom themes, headless storefronts, complex checkout flows, and third-party integrations that scale with your business.

faq3.q: How does your CRO and Data agency optimise my sales?
faq3.a: We run continuous A/B tests, heatmap analyses, and funnel audits. Every recommendation is backed by data — so changes drive real revenue, not guesswork.

faq4.q: How do you activate customer loyalty via CRM and Klaviyo?
faq4.a: We design automated email and SMS flows — from welcome series to win-back campaigns — using Klaviyo's segmentation engine to deliver the right message at the right moment.

faq5.q: Does Tapilla build institutional websites on Webflow or WordPress?
faq5.a: Yes. For brands that need a corporate or editorial site alongside their store, we build on Webflow or WordPress with the same attention to design, performance, and SEO.

Footer.ctaHeading:
WE HELP
BRING YOUR
PROJECTS TO LIFE.
Footer.companyDescription: Tapilla serves clients worldwide. Our team is based in Paris and Lyon, France.
